outputs.description: ID of the response policy. BlueCat.AddressManager.ResponsePolicies.Name Name of the response policy.
outputs.name: BlueCat.AddressManager.ResponsePolicies.ID

outputs.description: Time to live (TTL) of the response policy BlueCat.AddressManager.ResponsePolicies.Type Type of the responce policy ( BLACKLIST, BLACKHOLE, WHITELIST, or REDIRECT).
outputs.name: BlueCat.AddressManager.ResponsePolicies.Ttl

outputs.description: Target of redirect, in case of REDIRECT policy type.
outputs.name: BlueCat.AddressManager.ResponsePolicies.RedirectTarget
